name: Cocoa Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a 9-inch square pan with cooking spray and flour.
In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, applesauce, and egg white.
In another mixing bowl, combine cocoa powder, flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake for 35 minutes.
